intro: ^Yabai... There's no way we're getting into UTokyo like this!
^Making sure you stay focused! You've been distracted!
^I didn't know you guys could show up... out here.
^They're being dramatic. I haven't fallen behind or anything.
^Besides, all that's really left is to maintain my GPA anyway.
^If you're not careful, everything will fall apart! Ka-kaw!
^Stay focused! Time to study! Time to study!
^Okay, I get it. I’ll be fine.
meetingkazumi: ^By the way, I'm still bummed out about yesterday.
^The one time I managed to achieve the impossible... the world had to turn its back on me.
^It's not like that cafe is going anywhere, you could go today.
^That's not the important thing, I managed to convince YOU to come with me yesterday.
^I guess that really was the only time I've skipped cram school, huh.
^My parents would kill me if they found out.
^They won't! And anyway, your mom loves me, so...
afterchoice: ^But if it rains like that again today, we'll just have to go another time, okay?
^I won't even be out for long!
^Did you forget that there's a test tomorrow? You must ace it! Go study! Go study!
^You know that I’ve already memorized everything, it was covered in cram school a while ago—
^Prove it, then! Go see the professor and prove it!
afterchoice2: ^I still have to study for tomorrow's test.
^That’s okay. I’ll convince you, you’ll see!
^(It’s not a distraction if I’m already well prepared.)
^You again? I said I’ll be fine.
^Tomorrow’s test is a no-brainer, it was covered in cram school so long ago—
^Prove it, then! Go see the professor and prove it!
